description_long: This is a robust, double-edged axe with a dark metallic blade and a matching handle, both exhibiting a worn, battle-scarred appearance. The blade is broad and slightly curved, featuring a pointed tip on the opposite end, and is adorned with angular, engraved patterns that add a decorative touch. The handle is straight, cylindrical, and appears to be made of metal, with subtle textural variations and scuff marks indicating heavy use. The axe head is securely mounted atop the handle, with the blade extending outward and the spike projecting from the rear. The overall finish is glossy, reflecting light off its dark surfaces, and the object exudes a sense of weight and durability. This axe would be suitable for display, collection, or practical use in an urban garage, workshop, or themed environment.
description: A heavy, dark metallic axe with a broad, engraved blade and a straight, worn handle, featuring a glossy, battle-worn finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the curved blade and pointed rear spike, with engraved patterns visible on the blade.
description_view_1: Edge-on view highlighting the narrowness of the blade and handle, with the pointed tip and spike aligned.
description_view_2: Opposite side view revealing the other face of the blade and spike, with similar engravings and wear marks.
description_view_3: Rear edge-on view showing the alignment of the blade and handle, with minimal blade width visible.
attribute_handle_type: Straight, cylindrical metal handle with a smooth, slightly textured surface and no visible grip enhancements.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, single main edge with a pronounced curve, pointed rear spike, and angular engraved patterns on the blade face.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade fitted over the handle top.
